evals.prompt: Generate Zephyr test cases for {PROJECT}-{ID}: 'As a Customer in VN market, I can download invoices from the Order Detail screen. Web only.'
evals.expected_output: Run impact analysis first (Get Issue Link Test Cases). Platform = Web, so use Web_ prefix in TC name. Create TC with customFields, then Create Test Case Steps, then Create Test Case Issue Link to {PROJECT}-{ID}.

evals.prompt: The Reorder button behavior changed in {PROJECT}-{ID}. There are existing Zephyr TCs. What should I do?
evals.expected_output: Run impact analysis: Step A direct lookup via Get Issue Link Test Cases, then Step B supplemental search. Map ACs to coverage: Covered, Partial, Not Covered. For covered TCs, show before/after diff and wait for approval before updating. Do not create duplicates.

evals.prompt: Create test cases for a feature that applies to both Web and Mobile, but Sales Reps and Customers see different data.
evals.expected_output: Create separate TCs per actor — no OR conditions. Since the feature applies to both Web and Mobile (single AC row), use no platform prefix and set Platform = Web and Mobile. Populate Roles custom field per TC.

should_not_trigger: Write a Flutter widget test for the order screen
Analyze the business rules in the AC before writing tests
Set up build_runner for code generation
